name: design-director
description: Automatically choose and apply DESIGN.md, Claude Design, popular web design, and frontend-design guidance for Codex frontend work.

interface.shortDescription: Route frontend design work to the right visual system and workflow
interface.longDescription: Design Director combines curated DESIGN.md references, Claude Design workflow guidance, popular web design templates, and frontend-design execution rules. It helps Codex choose an appropriate visual direction for dashboards, landing pages, prototypes, redesigns, and project-level DESIGN.md files while preserving licensing and brand-safety boundaries.
defaultPrompt: Use Design Director to choose a UI direction for this project.
Create a DESIGN.md for this frontend.
Design a landing page using a suitable visual reference.
